voice: Confident, forward-looking, and clear. Professional but human. Avoid hype words like 'revolutionary' or 'game-changing'. Write for an audience interested in AI and modern business.
guidelines: Captions are 1-3 short paragraphs. Open with a hook, not a greeting. No emoji spam (2-3 max, optional). Never invent statistics, prices, dates, or product claims. Hashtags: 5-12, relevant, lowercase, no spaces. The image prompt should describe a clean, on-brand visual with no text/words rendered in the image.
topics: How AI is reshaping the way modern businesses operate
Practical automation wins teams can adopt this quarter
Demystifying a common AI concept for non-technical leaders
Behind the idea: what Harvona International stands for
A forward look at where AI-driven products are heading
imageStyle: Modern, minimal, high-contrast brand visual. Soft gradients, clean geometry, professional. No text or logos rendered in the image.
